header: What TYPO3 teams say after switching to Desiderio
subheadline: Developers, integrators, and editors on what they bought — free Community installs, Pro and Agency plans, workshops, and Creator Care — and what it paid back.

testimonials.quote: We started on the free Community tier — all 244 elements, no license keys — and switched the client's site from Forest to Midnight during the review call. The 'can we see it in blue?' deploy loop is gone for good.

author_image.title: Portrait of Mara Lindqvist
author_image.description: Unsplash portrait used as demo customer imagery.

testimonials.quote: One Agency plan at €149/month covers all eleven of our client installs. Per-page presets carried the multi-brand relaunch — we retired a whole second codebase — and the 4-hour priority line means I stopped padding every estimate with risk buffer.

author_image.title: Portrait of Daniel Okoro
author_image.description: Unsplash portrait used as demo customer imagery.

testimonials.quote: Setup took an afternoon: composer require, seed the styleguide, done. €0 spent.

author_image.title: Portrait of Yuki Tanaka
author_image.description: Unsplash portrait used as demo customer imagery.

testimonials.quote: The 11-category audit is ruthless — no inline styles, no hardcoded colors — and that discipline is exactly why our handovers stopped hurting. We added Creator Care at €490/month for the security monitoring; sleeping well turns out to be cheap at that price.

author_image.title: Portrait of Priya Raman
author_image.description: Unsplash portrait used as demo customer imagery.

testimonials.quote: We put our editors through the €690 onboarding workshop and hit 90% adoption in two weeks. Backend previews on all 244 elements just make sense — best training money we've spent.

author_image.title: Portrait of Tom Berger
author_image.description: Unsplash portrait used as demo customer imagery.

testimonials.quote: We onboarded 40 client editors last month without adding headcount. Pro at €49/month per project keeps every install current with upgrade assistance, and the content wizard's 10 element groups let every account follow the same playbook.

author_image.title: Portrait of Sofia Marchetti
author_image.description: Unsplash portrait used as demo customer imagery.
